mapper.select: SELECT boardId, boardName, boardType, description, allowComment, allowAttach, allowAnonymous, allowSearch, readRole, writeRole, listCount, newDays, sortOrder, useYn, createdUser, createdDate, updateUser, updatedDate FROM board_master WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_master (boardId, boardName, boardType, description, allowComment, allowAttach, allowAnonymous, allowSearch, readRole, writeRole, listCount, newDays, sortOrder, useYn, createdUser, updateUser) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{boardName}, #{boardType}, #{description}, #{allowComment}, #{allowAttach}, #{allowAnonymous}, #{allowSearch}, #{readRole}, #{writeRole}, #{listCount}, #{newDays}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{createdUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_master SET boardName = #{boardName}, boardType = #{boardType}, description = #{description}, allowComment = #{allowComment}, allowAttach = #{allowAttach}, allowAnonymous = #{allowAnonymous}, allowSearch = #{allowSearch}, readRole = #{readRole}, writeRole = #{writeRole}, listCount = #{listCount}, newDays = #{newDays}, sortOrder = #{sortOrder}, useYn = #{useYn}, updateUser = #{updateUser}, updatedDate = NOW() WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_master WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
SELECT CONCAT('BRD', LPAD( COALESCE(CAST(SUBSTRING(MAX(boardId), 4) AS UNSIGNED), 0) + 1, 3, '0' )) AS nextBoardId FROM board_master WHERE boardId REGEXP '^BRD[0-9]+$'

SELECT m.boardId, m.boardName, COUNT(p.postId) AS postCount, COALESCE(SUM(p.likeCount),0) AS totalLikes FROM board_master m LEFT JOIN board_post p ON m.boardId = p.boardId AND p.useYn = 'Y' GROUP BY m.boardId, m.boardName ORDER BY m.sortOrder
